item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: This summer start your career with AbbVie

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: AbbVie’s summer internship program offers current undergraduate and graduate college students the opportunity to gain impactful industry experience across a wide range of business and scientific areas, from R&D and commercial to HR, finance, operations and more.

block.name: Video
block.overlayDescription: Experiences and thoughts from interns at AbbVie

item_1781087584869.name: Accordion Item
item_1781087584869.summary: How long are internship programs at AbbVie?
item_1781087584869.text: Our internships typically run for ten to twelve weeks over the summer, from May to August, and are full-time, paid experiences.

item_1781087607534.name: Accordion Item
item_1781087607534.summary: What business areas can interns explore at AbbVie?
item_1781087607534.text:
We have internship opportunities available in:

  • Commercial
  • Corporate
  • Operations
  • Research & Development

item_1781087614686.name: Accordion Item
item_1781087614686.summary: What is the internship experience like at AbbVie?
item_1781087614686.text:
• Real, impactful project work
  • Exposure to leaders throughout the organization
  • Skill-building sessions
  • Social events to build your professional network
  • Immersed in a purpose-driven, inclusive culture that fosters curiosity, collaboration, and connection
  • Access to wellness tools and philanthropic initiatives
  • Opportunity to present projects to functional peers and leaders

item_1781087619677.name: Accordion Item
item_1781087619677.text:
We offer internships across ten+ U.S. sites, including:
Irvine, CA; Pleasanton, CA; South San Francisco, CA; Lake County, IL; Cambridge, MA; Waltham, MA; Worcester, MA; Wyandotte, MI; Branchburg, NJ; Florham Park, NJ; Madison, NJ; Waco, TX; Sales field-based locations.

Specific locations may vary depending on your role and function, so please check the individual listing on our career site for more details.

item_1781087627700.name: Accordion Item
item_1781087627700.summary: Who is eligible to apply for an AbbVie internship?
item_1781087627700.text:
If you’re a currently enrolled third-year undergraduate college student, or a graduate college student pursuing a master’s, MBA, PhD, or PharmD degree, then you should consider applying!

Eligibility may vary by program, so refer to individual listings on our career site for specific degree requirements.

item_1781087633029.name: Accordion Item
item_1781087633029.summary: Is relocation support available for AbbVie interns?
item_1781087633029.text: If eligible, you’ll receive relocation support to help with travel and housing expenses through our relocation vendor.

item_0.name: Accordion Item
item_0.summary: What is the AbbVie interview process like?
item_0.text: You may go through phone or video interviews, with a mix of behavioral, technical, or case-style questions based on the role.

item_1.name: Accordion Item
item_1.summary: What are the internship start and end dates?
item_1.text: Internships typically begin in May and end in August, running for approximately 10-12 weeks.

item_2.name: Accordion Item
item_2.summary: What areas of the business offer internships?
item_2.text:
Internships are available across a range of functions, including:

  • Commercial
  • Corporate
  • Operations
  • Research & Development

item_3.name: Accordion Item
item_3.text: Yes, all internships are paid, full-time positions.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Sign up today to receive future job opportunities tailored to your interests.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Sign up today to recieve updates on future opportunities.
